revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox dim/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox dim/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox dim/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox dim/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox dim}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
== Usage == {{tl|Infobox dim}} is used inside infoboxes to generate the dim argument for geohack links. The template accepts a number of (optional) parameters that describe the physical dimensions of an object: {{div col|colwidth=15em}} * length_mi * length_km * width_mi * width_km * area_mi2 * area_km2 * area_acre * area_ha {{div col end}} The template also accepts other geohack parameters to generate the dim argument: * scale * type (e.g., "mountain" or "city") * population (for type="city" only)
== See also == *{{tl|Infobox mountain}} *{{tl|Infobox ecoregion}} *{{tl|Infobox protected area}} <includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> {{Sandbox other|| }} </includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Map formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Place-related infobox templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
